records.m_Talk_ENG: Hraagh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hraagh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hraagh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh! Sir! I'll become a Remains to stop him!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh! Sir! I'll become a Remains to stop him!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh! Sir! I'll become a Remains to stop him!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be enough to buy you some time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be enough to buy you some time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be enough to buy you some time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please! Get away from here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please! Get away from here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please! Get away from here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no you don't! Do you really think that plan will work against me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no you don't! Do you really think that plan will work against me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no you don't! Do you really think that plan will work against me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must reflect on your choices!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must reflect on your choices!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must reflect on your choices!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kuh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kuh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kuh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over. Give up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over. Give up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over. Give up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do I have to repeat myself? I asked you to move aside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do I have to repeat myself? I asked you to move aside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do I have to repeat myself? I asked you to move aside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? What did you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? What did you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? What did you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! Get behind me! He's hiding something!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! Get behind me! He's hiding something!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! Get behind me! He's hiding something!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krrgh...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krrgh...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krrgh...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a sturdy body you have. Taking my attack head-on instead of avoiding it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a sturdy body you have. Taking my attack head-on instead of avoiding it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a sturdy body you have. Taking my attack head-on instead of avoiding it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must have trained your body every day. I believe this will be a good fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must have trained your body every day. I believe this will be a good fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must have trained your body every day. I believe this will be a good fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you also think so, hound of the Institution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you also think so, hound of the Institution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you also think so, hound of the Institution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Department of Philosophy, Archeology, Arts, and Architecture...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Department of Philosophy, Archeology, Arts, and Architecture...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Department of Philosophy, Archeology, Arts, and Architecture...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. Among the departments that were purged, was there still a dean-level person like you left?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. Among the departments that were purged, was there still a dean-level person like you left?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. Among the departments that were purged, was there still a dean-level person like you left?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shoot the Dean of Archeology while Agent Ferrier buys us time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shoot the Dean of Archeology while Agent Ferrier buys us time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shoot the Dean of Archeology while Agent Ferrier buys us time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is time for the feast!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is time for the feast!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is time for the feast!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fear not death, everyone! Mother will guide us to one!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fear not death, everyone! Mother will guide us to one!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fear not death, everyone! Mother will guide us to one!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will be born from Mother's womb anew!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will be born from Mother's womb anew!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will be born from Mother's womb anew!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the hell?! Those bastards aren't Counters, but they don't avoid our bullets!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the hell?! Those bastards aren't Counters, but they don't avoid our bullets!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the hell?! Those bastards aren't Counters, but they don't avoid our bullets!

records.m_Talk_ENG: James. I will send some of our followers to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: James. I will send some of our followers to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: James. I will send some of our followers to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go ahead and secure the <color=#ffd34c>Holy Grail</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go ahead and secure the <color=#ffd34c>Holy Grail</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go ahead and secure the <color=#ffd34c>Holy Grail</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will finalise the preparations for Mother's awakening.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will finalise the preparations for Mother's awakening.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will finalise the preparations for Mother's awakening.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then we will meet again when the ritual starts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then we will meet again when the ritual starts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then we will meet again when the ritual starts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't run away from me, James!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't run away from me, James!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't run away from me, James!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will not take another step forward, hound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will not take another step forward, hound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will not take another step forward, hound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This feeling of hopelessness... as if I'm faced against a large wall...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This feeling of hopelessness... as if I'm faced against a large wall...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This feeling of hopelessness... as if I'm faced against a large wall...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strange. I feel like I know him even though I've never met him before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strange. I feel like I know him even though I've never met him before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strange. I feel like I know him even though I've never met him before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Contact the Institution right now. Request for reinforcements to chase after James!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Contact the Institution right now. Request for reinforcements to chase after James!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Contact the Institution right now. Request for reinforcements to chase after James!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, sir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, sir!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe our fight will take a while. So how about we introduce ourselves?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe our fight will take a while. So how about we introduce ourselves?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe our fight will take a while. So how about we introduce ourselves?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Ryan Ferrier. The man who will defeat you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Ryan Ferrier. The man who will defeat you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Ryan Ferrier. The man who will defeat you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Funny. A hound pretending to be a knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Funny. A hound pretending to be a knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Funny. A hound pretending to be a knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've thrown away my name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've thrown away my name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've thrown away my name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am now... the knight that guards the Lake of Knowledge...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am now... the knight that guards the Lake of Knowledge...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am now... the knight that guards the Lake of Knowledge...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am the Knight of the Lake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am the Knight of the Lake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am the Knight of the Lake.
